message:
fix(dispatch): use AxisSpec::resolve for vmap out_axes and reject OOB indices

The vmap output axis resolution previously used inline arithmetic that
silently accepted out-of-bounds positive indices (e.g. out_axes=1 on a
rank-1 output) by falling through to the identity branch. Now it
delegates to AxisSpec::resolve() for consistent negative-axis handling
and returns VmapAxesOutOfBounds for any resolved index >= rank.

- Replace manual axis resolution with AxisSpec::Batched(...).resolve(rank)
- Split the bounds+identity check into separate >= rank error and == 0 identity
- Add test_out_axes_error_positive_out_of_bounds (rank-1, out_axes=1)
- Add test_out_axes_error_negative_out_of_bounds (rank-2, out_axes=-3)
- Update test_out_axes_1_trailing comment to reflect corrected semantics

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
